# CODING_GUIDELINES

## General

- Keep changes scoped.
- Prefer small commits.
- Do not modify generated files unless the generator is also updated.
- Do not commit private data, tokens, keys, or internal URLs.

## Agent Rules

- Read `.agent-memory/CURRENT.md` before starting.
- Read `.agent-memory/DECISIONS.md` before starting.
- Update progress after each completed task.
- Update lessons after any correction, failed assumption, or repeated bug.
